name: opencloudtouch-frontend
description: OpenCloudTouch - Local control for compatible streaming devices

scripts.test:e2e:local: npm run build && start-server-and-test preview http://localhost:4173 test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e:headed: npm run build && start-server-and-test preview http://localhost:4173 "cypress run --headed --browser chrome"
scripts.test:e2e:open: npm run build && start-server-and-test preview http://localhost:4173 "cypress open"
scripts.screenshots: npm run build && start-server-and-test preview http://localhost:4173 screenshots:run
scripts.screenshots:headed: npm run build && start-server-and-test preview http://localhost:4173 "cypress run --config-file cypress.ux.config.ts --browser chrome --headed"
scripts.audit:a11y: npm run build && start-server-and-test preview http://localhost:4173 audit:a11y:run
scripts.audit:a11y:headed: npm run build && start-server-and-test preview http://localhost:4173 "cypress run --config-file cypress.audit.config.ts --browser chrome --headed"
scripts.clean: rimraf node_modules dist .vite coverage cypress/screenshots cypress/videos
